results.rendered_html: upa-sattṛ m. one who has seated himself near or at (esp. at the domestic fire), any person who is domiciled, the inhabitant of a house (with and without gṛha),  AV. ii, 6, 2 ; iii, 12, 16 ; vii, 82, 3 ;  VS. xxvii, 2 ; 4 ;  ChUp.
